title: W2 Task Manager evolution: additive task/run-link fields + migration (TM-01..TM-03)

AC1.note: TM-01 spec: 7 additive OPTIONAL fields, schemaVersion 1->2 read-time migration, backward-compat matrix (FlowTask+FlowState+CLI), 8 OPEN items. Orchestrator-validated.

AC2.note: TM-02: migration.test.ts + disposition.test.ts; deterministic v1->v2 fixtures (todo/in-progress/done+/-history), all 4 dispositions, negative schemaVersion>2 case. RED verified before TM-03.

AC3.note: TM-03: additive fields + pure v1->v2 migration in src/flow; flows 001-004 load, list/status/check unchanged; --depends/--disposition settable; check accepts 1&2; TM-02 GREEN (34/34).

AC4.note: D-02 preserved: writeFlow only in TM save/init; runLink never assigned (reference type only); taskGateStatus pure & unwired; no 2nd coordinator. T8 review PASS.

AC5.note: tsc --noEmit clean; full bun test 554 pass/0 fail; legacy v1 flow.json byte-untouched (git clean); code-verifier PASS.
